race.comment: Open race but RICHE D'AMOUR (7) has turned in three cracking run this campaign and deserves to break through. Went back when drew off the track and flashed home two back then wound up strongly and was runner-up latest. Course and distance winner who looks tough to stop. SEE YA LATER BABY (2) is hard to fault winning last three, the latest leading throughout here. More weight but in great form and will take catching again. EMBELLISHER (11) got home well fresh to place in the same race as RICHE D'AMOUR latest. Fitter and expected to run well again. EXTRA HOT (12) came from well back on the turn to score last time out over 1200m at Murray Bridge. Another bold showing is expected. HALLIWELL (3) is going better than form suggests, the latest at Caulfield. Well placed here and should be ready to fire.
